task.title: Design iOS Mission Control App - Phase 1
task.description: Create iPhone mockups and design specification for Mission Control iOS app. Screens: Task Board (Kanban), Agent Activity Feed, Team View, Settings. Deliverables: Figma file with high-fidelity mockups + design spec document. Platform: iOS 16+, iPhone SE through iPhone 15 Pro. Requirements: Native iOS patterns, WebSocket-ready, WCAG AA accessible, glassmorphic design.

Requirements: Native iOS patterns, WebSocket-ready, WCAG AA accessible, glassmorphic design.

milestones.name: Discovery & Requirements
milestones.description: Understand user needs, constraints, technical requirements

milestones.name: Wireframes & Flow
milestones.description: Create low-fidelity layouts and user journeys

milestones.name: High-Fidelity Design
milestones.description: Develop polished mockups with design system components

milestones.name: Design Review & Iteration
milestones.description: Stakeholder feedback and refinement

milestones.name: Handoff & Documentation
milestones.description: Prepare design specs and component library for dev

successCriteria.description: Mockups match brand guidelines and user requirements
Designs are intuitive and follow UX best practices

risks.mitigation: Agree on scope upfront, manage change requests
Present multiple options early, get feedback in phases

task.title: API Hardening for iOS Mission Control - Phase 3
task.description: Audit Mission Control API endpoints for mobile compatibility. Add CORS headers for iOS bundle ID (com.elevationaiagent.missioncontrol). Ensure JWT auth flow works on mobile. Test API with iOS WebSocket client. Verify endpoints handle mobile-specific network conditions (reconnection, timeout). Deliverable: API audit report + implementation of mobile-required changes.

executionPlan.title: API Hardening for iOS Mission Control - Phase 3
executionPlan.description: Audit Mission Control API endpoints for mobile compatibility. Add CORS headers for iOS bundle ID (com.elevationaiagent.missioncontrol). Ensure JWT auth flow works on mobile. Test API with iOS WebSocket client. Verify endpoints handle mobile-specific network conditions (reconnection, timeout). Deliverable: API audit report + implementation of mobile-required changes.
deliverables: API audit report + implementation of mobile

task.title: DC Northeast Growth
task.description: I would like to develop a plan to grow my business Pro-Tel. I would like to focus on the Data Center Structured cable installation market in Upstate NY and PA. The output should be daily emails to my work email tim.ryan@pro-tel.com that continue to guide me to the goal.

task.title: Review API endpoint security
task.description: Audit task API endpoints for auth, validation, SQL injection vulnerabilities. Check rate limiting, input sanitization, and error handling. Deliverables: Security audit report with findings and remediation recommendations.

milestones.description: Scan, test, identify security issues

milestones.description: Categorize findings, write detailed report

milestones.description: Prioritize issues, recommend fixes, estimate effort

task.title: Design: Unified Project/Task Status Dashboard
task.description:
Design a merged dashboard that combines: 1. Projects page (overview of all projects) 2. Task Board (task management with kanban) 3. Task Progress (real-time tracking with timelines)

Goals: Single unified view for project + task management, Show project overview + all tasks within each project, Real-time progress tracking, Timeline/Gantt-style view for task dependencies, Agent assignments visible, Status filtering

Deliverables: Figma mockup of unified dashboard, Design spec (layouts, components, data flow), Navigation/interaction patterns, Mobile responsiveness considerations
